jobPosting.title: VP of Engineering
jobPosting.descriptionHtml:
Lead our engineering organization through the next phase of growth.

What we're looking for

  • 10+ years of engineering leadership
  • Experience scaling teams from 20 to 100+
  • Track record of shipping complex products
